_notes: P4 China sources. Smoke-tested 2026-05-20 — the China public-RSS landscape in 2025-2026 is heavily degraded (most regulator sites went SPA + WAF and dropped RSS). Only NBS still publishes valid Atom/RSS. CSRC, PBoC, HKEX, SSE, SZSE, NFRA, SAFE all dropped RSS or are JS-rendered + bot-blocked; documenting them here so the next person doesn't waste time re-discovering. If/when those endpoints come back, add them to the `feeds` array of the relevant section.

regulators._notes: NBS (国家统计局) is the only PRC regulator with a verified working RSS endpoint as of 2026-05-20. Both feeds return real text/xml. We treat NBS as Tier 1 because it publishes the originating macro-data series (CPI, PPI, GDP, IIP) — which is exactly what AI Fintech investors want before any commentary.

_blocked.name: CSRC 证监会要闻
_blocked.issue: List page is JS-rendered SPA; old RSS endpoints (/rss.xml, /pub/newsite/zjhxwfb/xwdd/rss.xml) all 200 with text/html homepage. JSON API exists at /searchList/{uuid} but channelId mapping not public. Would need headless-browser scraping; out of scope for P4 v0.

_blocked.name: PBoC 人民银行
_blocked.issue: Same SPA pattern as CSRC. Listing pages 200/text-html but article list loaded via AJAX. RSS endpoints 404 across the board.

_blocked.name: HKEX 港交所
_blocked.issue: All endpoints return 503 even with Chrome UA + full Accept headers — bot-protection (Akamai/CFD WAF). News listings only via news center HTML which is also bot-protected.

_blocked.name: SSE 上交所 / SZSE 深交所
_blocked.issue: Disclosure listing pages 200/text-html only; old RSS endpoints (announce_RSS.xml etc.) 404.

_blocked.name: Xinhua 新华社时政
_blocked.issue: RSS at xinhuanet.com/politics/news_politics.xml returns 200/text-xml but feed has not updated since 2022-12. Effectively dead.

vc_blogs._notes: No working public RSS confirmed for major PRC investment banks (CICC 中金 / CITIC 中信证券 / Huatai 华泰证券) or top-tier RMB VCs (Hillhouse 高瓴 / Sequoia China 红杉中国). research.cicc.com/rss returns 403, others return HTML homepages. Section kept as scaffold for future when one comes online.
